title: Kadai Mushroom
servings: 3–4 | Prep Time: 15 mins | Cook Time: 25 mins

instruction.title: Prepare the Masala Paste
steps: In a blender, combine onions, tomatoes, green chilies, ginger, garlic, red chili, coriander, turmeric, and salt.
Blend into a smooth paste and set aside.

instruction.title: Cook Mushrooms
steps: Heat 2 tbsp oil in a kadai or deep pan on medium-high heat.
Add cumin seeds and let them splutter.
Add the chopped onions and sauté until golden brown.
Add the masala paste and cook on medium heat for 8–10 minutes until oil separates.

instruction.title: Combine Mushrooms and Vegetables
steps: Add mushrooms and capsicum to the masala.
Mix well and cook for 5–7 minutes until mushrooms are tender but not soggy.
Add garam masala and crushed kasuri methi. Adjust salt and chili as needed.

instruction.title: Finishing Touch
steps: Serve hot in a kadai or serving bowl with naan, roti, or steamed rice.

chefTips: Roast the dry spices (coriander, cumin, fennel) before grinding for a more aromatic masala.
Use a mix of butter and oil for a richer taste.
Slightly char the mushrooms on high heat before adding to the curry for a smoky flavor.
